Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customers receive timely, accurate updates without staff manually writing individual emails, improving satisfaction and reducing inbound status calls.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract make, model, year, and part number data for all listed two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: A comprehensive competitive fitment reference is built automatically, replacing what would be days of manual catalog review across three vendors.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references scraped vendor fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and compiles matches, gaps, and opportunities into a formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives a clean, actionable gap analysis showing exactly where DFC has coverage and where new part opportunities exist.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor fitments not yet in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Demand signals are collected at scale without any manual outreach effort, giving the product team real data to prioritize new part additions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every running campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Complete ad copy is captured instantly across all active campaigns, making it possible to audit hundreds of ads in seconds.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags each match with the exact ad, field name, and copy excerpt where the phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Compliance or quality issues are identified with surgical precision across the entire ad library, with no manual reading required.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged-copy report listing every match found, organized by ad and field, so the team can act on findings immediately.
Meta Investigation.impact: Stakeholders receive a precise, ready-to-act report without logging into any ad platform or manually searching through copy.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live campaign data from Meta and TikTok — including spend, performance metrics, audience data, and active ad copy — to serve as the real-time knowledge base for the chatbot.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: The chatbot always answers based on current, live data rather than stale exports, making every response immediately actionable.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Receives natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with analysis, comparisons, and recommendations drawn from the live Meta and TikTok data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Anyone on the team can get instant, intelligent answers about paid performance without pulling reports or querying ad platforms directly.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors jobs@r1concepts.com for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and candidate information from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Every application is captured and processed the moment it arrives, eliminating inbox backlog and ensuring no candidate is missed.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role and date for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: All candidate files are stored consistently and accessibly, replacing scattered email attachments with a clean, searchable archive.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, determines the appropriate outcome — advance, deny, or pause — and drafts the corresponding candidate reply.
Resume Bot.impact: Every candidate is evaluated consistently against the same criteria in seconds, removing bias and reducing recruiter screening time dramatically.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate decision to a master dashboard with columns for score, outcome, role, and date, and routes paused-role candidates to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Hiring managers have a real-time, organized view of the full candidate pipeline without managing a single email thread.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to build strong momentum, with 56 total agents across the portfolio — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline held steady across the board. The growing base of 29 completed agents means a significant portion of our automation work is already running and delivering value daily, weekly, and monthly across marketing, sales, support, and operations. With 10 agents actively in development and 17 more on the roadmap, we have a healthy queue of automation coming down the line — great work to everyone contributing to the build!
